access_denied.title: Organizer panel unavailable
access_denied.lead: Accounts with the «User» or «Referee» role cannot use the admin panel — use the organization’s public site instead.
access_denied.hint: Ask your organization administrator to change your role if you need access.

tenant_admin.title: Organization administrator required
tenant_admin.lead: Only organization administrators can open this section (not tournament admins or moderators).
tenant_admin.hint: Ask your organization administrator if you need access.

news.title: News
news.intro: You can save a draft without linking it to a tournament. To publish on the site, select a competition (tournament).
news.tournament_hint: To publish on the public site, link the item to a tournament. Without a tournament it stays a draft.
news.cover_hint: Files are stored under the news/ prefix in object storage; raster images are converted to WebP. You can also paste a URL.
news.publish_blocked_hint: Select a tournament first, then enable publishing.

gallery.title: Tournament photo gallery
gallery.hub_intro: Pick a tournament to manage photos, captions, and order. They appear on the public Media page.
gallery.hub_empty: Select a tournament above to open its gallery.
gallery.intro: Uploads go to the gallery/ prefix in storage; captions and order apply on the public Media page.
gallery.delete_confirm: Remove this photo from the gallery?

logout.title: Confirm sign out
logout.message: Are you sure you want to leave the admin panel?

profile.title: My profile
profile.intro: Your name, login, and password for this organization.
profile.email_readonly: Email cannot be changed here yet.
profile.role_readonly: An organization admin can change your role under Users.
profile.name: First name
profile.current_password_hint: Enter your current password if you set a new one below.
profile.current_password_required: Enter your current password to change it.
profile.password_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password

settings.public_tab_locked_hint: Public branding editor is available from the Premier plan (not included in Free and Amateur).
settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Theme, language, and accent apply immediately and are stored in this browser. Use Save to sync them to your account on the server.
settings.save_hint: Write the current settings to your account on the server.
settings.save_error: Could not save to the server. Check network and sign-in.

language.title: Interface language
language.hint: App copy and PrimeVue component labels.

accent.title: Accent color
accent.hint: Primary color for buttons and highlights.

subscription.title: Organization plan
subscription.hint: Billing is not wired yet: pick a plan for testing. Later this will come from billing; section access can still be limited by roles.
subscription.forbidden: Only the organization administrator can change the plan.

features.public_custom_branding: Public site: branding, SEO, social links
features.advanced_playoff_formats: Advanced formats and large playoff brackets
features.reference_directory_basic: Directories: seasons, age groups, team categories
features.data_import_export: Bulk player import and data exchange
features.public_site_admin_settings: Public site editor in admin (branding, SEO)

subscription.tournament_limit_reached_hint: You have reached the tournament limit for your current plan ({max}). Upgrade to create more.

feature_unavailable.title: This section is unavailable
feature_unavailable.lead: This capability is not included in your organization’s plan.
feature_unavailable.hint: Upgrade the plan in settings or contact the platform administrator.

validation.date_not_future: Date cannot be in the future.
validation.end_after_start: End time must be later than start time.
validation.slug_latin_dash: Use only latin letters, digits, and hyphen.
validation.invalid_time_hhmm: Time must be in HH:mm format.
validation.schedule_overflow: Too many rounds for one day with current settings.
validation.one_day_conflict: For one-day mode, schedule must fit into a single day.
validation.playoff_qualifiers_exceed_min_teams: Playoff needs {groups} × {k} = {needed} teams, but the tournament is set to {minTeams}. Increase team count or lower qualifiers per group.

tournament_form.status_auto_hint: Draft — no matches yet. Becomes Active when matches exist (generated schedule or manual). Completed — when every match is played, canceled, or closed in the protocol. Archive is only set manually from the list.
tournament_form.manual_only_tariff: Your plan does not include automatic calendar generation: only the manual schedule format is available. Create matches on the Matches tab (or from the tournament calendar).
tournament_form.legacy_format_need_manual_or_plan: This format expects auto-generation, which is not on your plan. Switch to manual-only schedule or upgrade to Premier to use generation again.
tournament_form.calendar_color_hint: This tournament’s matches use this color on the organization calendar. You can still override a single match color from the event dialog.

tournaments_list.title: Tournaments
tournaments_list.subtitle: Create tournaments, set up the calendar, and manage teams.
tournaments_list.empty_lead: Create your first tournament: pick a format, add teams and a schedule — standings, calendar, and public pages stay in one place.

tournament_page.reorder_saved_detail: Match times were recalculated by slots.
tournament_page.groups_even_detail: With {teams} teams and {groups} groups, each group must have exactly {size}. Swap by drag-and-drop or cancel action.
tournament_page.groups_updated_not_regenerated_detail: Calendar not regenerated: not enough teams.
tournament_page.composition_edit_forbidden_schedule_deta: Cannot change team composition while schedule has matches. Clear calendar first on the Calendar tab.
tournament_page.composition_edit_forbidden_status_detail: Changes are available only for draft and before results are entered.
tournament_page.rounds_per_day_hint: How many rounds to place in one calendar day. Total slot time for all rounds per day must not exceed time until midnight from day start; otherwise reduce rounds per day or increase parallel matches.
tournament_page.round_robin_cycles_hint: How many times each pair of teams plays: 1 = one match, 2 = home/away.
tournament_page.preview_hint: Estimate updates live. Day check: total slot time for all rounds per day must not exceed minutes until midnight from start time (minimum across allowed days).
tournament_page.one_day_hint: Simplified mode: interval = 1 day, allowed day is taken from start date, day overrides are disabled.
tournament_page.scheduling_mode_hint: Flow mode: next-round matches may start earlier if field and teams are free. Strict rounds: next round starts only after current round finishes.
tournament_page.calendar_manual_detail: For manual-only format calendar cannot be generated automatically.
tournament_page.schedule_overflow_detailed: Too many rounds for one day: requires {needed} slot minutes, but minimum available before midnight is {available}. Reduce rounds/day, increase parallel matches, or reduce duration/break.
tournament_page.one_day_detailed: For one-day mode schedule must fit in 1 day. Increase rounds/day, increase parallel matches, or reduce duration/break.
tournament_page.groups_created_playoff_detail: Playoff will be available after group results are entered.
tournament_page.manual_schedule_hint: Manual schedule: auto-generation is disabled. Add matches with the button on the right (at least 2 teams required in composition).
tournament_page.schedule_overflow_short: Too many rounds for one calendar day with current duration, break, and parallelism. Reduce rounds/day, increase parallel matches, or reduce duration/break.
tournament_page.one_day_short: For one-day mode schedule must fit into 1 day. Currently requires {days} day(s).
tournament_page.preview_estimate_hint: Estimate is approximate and depends on tournament format, allowed days, and entered settings.
tournament_page.protocol_time_changed_hint: Start time changed — specify postpone reason if needed.
tournament_page.published_toggle_hint: When off, the tournament is hidden from the public catalog and direct links return “not found” for visitors.
tournament_page.published_unpublished_notice: Turn publishing on so visitors can open this tournament via the link without signing in.
tournament_page.published_draft_blocked_hint: While the tournament is a draft, it cannot be published. Once matches exist in the schedule, the status becomes Active and you can turn publishing on.
tournament_page.reference_fields_plan_basic_locked: Season and age group are not available on your plan (season and age-group directories require the Amateur plan or higher).
tournament_page.reference_fields_plan_standard_locked: Competition type, stadium, and referees are not available on your plan (stadiums, referees, and competition types require the Premier plan or higher).
tournament_page.list_card_publish_draft_tooltip: Draft tournaments cannot be published until the schedule exists (status becomes Active).
tournament_page.public_site_link_hint: Public standings page with this tournament selected. Copy and share with participants.
tournament_page.public_link_need_slug: Cannot build the link: organization slug is unknown. Open the admin on a tenant subdomain (e.g. org.example.com), restart the backend so tournament responses include tenant slug, or set NUXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG for local dev.
tournament_page.rounds_hint_open_protocol: Click a match to enter protocol (score and events).
tournament_page.calendar_empty_lead_generate: Generate the calendar from the tournament settings — rounds and matches will appear here for protocol entry.
tournament_page.calendar_empty_lead_manual: Add the first match manually. Filters and list views show up once there are matches on the schedule.
tournament_page.calendar_empty_manual_need_teams: You need at least two teams in the tournament to add a match.
tournament_page.calendar_automation_plan_notice: Automatic calendar and playoff generation is not included on your plan (Premier or higher required). Upgrade the organization plan in settings, or use the manual-only schedule format.
tournament_page.calendar_empty_legacy_format_hint: This format expects automatic calendar generation, which your plan does not include. Edit the tournament and switch to manual-only schedule, or upgrade the organization plan.
tournament_page.playoff_from_groups_hint: After all group matches are played and protocols are entered, you can generate knockout bracket by points and tie-breakers (same as auto formats). Number of qualified teams is set in tournament settings.
tournament_page.schedule_generated_lock_hint: Schedule is already generated: team composition and groups cannot be changed (otherwise it diverges from the bracket). You can still change ratings; calendar will be regenerated if needed. To add or remove teams again, delete matches in calendar or clear schedule.
tournament_page.groups_manual_hint: Group count is configured in Edit tournament (Group count, 2-8). Distribute teams across columns; with equal split the expected N teams per group is shown. Number of teams advancing is set in the tournament card.
tournament_page.groups_drag_hint: Drag teams between groups. After matches appear in schedule, groups and composition are locked - only before calendar generation. Edits are available for draft only.
tournament_page.groups_expected_size: {size} teams per group with current composition ({teams} teams, {groups} groups).
tournament_page.delete_match_confirm_message: Delete this match from tournament? Table and calendar will be updated.
tournament_page.day_start_time_overrides_hint: Leave empty to use default day start time.
tournament_page.replace_existing_calendar_hint: If disabled and matches already exist, server will return an error.
tournament_page.protocol_becoming_canceled_hint: Match status is being changed to Canceled.
tournament_page.invalid_day_start_time_format: Invalid start time for {day}. Use HH:mm format.

dashboard.title: Admin panel
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of tournaments, teams, and upcoming matches.

upcoming.title: Upcoming matches
upcoming.subtitle: Scheduled total: {n}
upcoming.empty: No scheduled matches yet — create a tournament and calendar first.

quick.title: Quick links
quick.hint: Counts are for your tenant. Refresh to load the latest numbers.

charts.entities_hint: Scale comparison across your tenant (absolute counts).

dashboard.card_matches_desc: Quick access to upcoming and past matches.

stub.info: More features will arrive in future iterations.
